special_mechanics.name: Plane Move
special_mechanics.description: Player can move freely to adjacent plane by pressing Light Punch and Light Kick buttons simultaneously

special_mechanics.name: Power Attack
special_mechanics.description: Special attack that knocks opponent to the other plane

special_mechanics.name: Low Plane Move Attack
special_mechanics.description: Press punch button to jump towards opponent on other plane

special_mechanics.name: High Plane Move Attack
special_mechanics.description: Press kick button to jump towards opponent on other plane

special_mechanics.name: Evasion Attack
special_mechanics.description: Special counterattack technique that can be performed after guarding opponent's attack

special_mechanics.name: Desperation Move (Fury)
special_mechanics.description: Powerful special move causing massive damage, only usable when life gauge is at 25% and flashing red

special_mechanics.name: Dash Back
special_mechanics.description: Player can dash back from opponent to retreat by quickly tapping lever backwards twice

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources document gameplay mechanics and features but contain no specific physics values, movement speeds, gravity constants, or sub-pixel system information. This is a fighting game rather than a platformer, so traditional jump/gravity physics are not primary design factors.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Fatal Fury 2 (SNES)
